- Transfer rumors, news: Kompany approves Bayern's Gordon pursuit
- Leeds' late equaliser keeps relegation pressure on Tottenham

- Transfer rumors, news: Kompany approves Bayern's Gordon pursuit: Anthony Gordon could be Bundesliga-bound as Bayern Munich's push to get the winger has been approved by manager Vincent Kompany. Transfer Talk has the latest.
- Leeds' late equaliser keeps relegation pressure on Tottenham: Spurs forward Mathys Tel both scores Tottenham's lone goal and concedes a late, reckless penalty to leave his club mired in relegation trouble. The managerial angle matters because tactical identity, dressing-room trust and club direction can shift quickly once results or ownership pressure build.
- Relegation pressure still on Tottenham after draw with Leeds: Tottenham forward Mathys Tel went from hero to zero after he gave away a reckless penalty following his opener in a 1-1 draw with Leeds to leave his team mired in relegation trouble. The managerial angle matters because tactical identity, dressing-room trust and club direction can shift quickly once results or ownership pressure build.
- De Zerbi claims referee 'was not calm' as Tottenham held by Leeds: Tottenham coach Roberto De Zerbi hit out at the officiating after his team's Monday draw with Leeds, which left Spurs still fighting to secure their Premier League survival. The managerial angle matters because tactical identity, dressing-room trust and club direction can shift quickly once results or ownership pressure build.
- Lamine Yamal teases Jude Bellingham after Barcelona Clásico win: Lamine Yamal appeared to bite back at Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham with a light-hearted "Talk is cheap" message on social media after Barcelona clinched the LaLiga title on Sunday. The table context matters here: title pressure, European qualification, relegation risk and fixture congestion can all change how this story is read.
